title: CptSDX23's Storage
description: Organized and searchable storage in Minecraft!
body:
CptSDX23's Storage is a mod aimed at improving the vanillla storage experience with a completely new storage system! No more rummaging through chests to find that one stack of gold you swore you had, or trying to remember where you put your spider eyes. Instead, use a Storage Center with Storage Containers to make a searchable network of all you items.

Current Features:

- Storage Core: Item crafted with 4 amethyst, 4 copper ingots, and a chest. Used in Storage Container and Storage Center recepies.
- Storage Center: Block crafted with 3 planks, 3 copper blocks, and a Storage Core. Interacing with this block will bring up a menu where you can search for, take, and deposit items in nearby Storage Containers.
- Copper Storage Container: Chest like block crafted with 3 planks, 5 copper ingots and a Storage Core. Has 9 slots of storage that can be accessed by a Storage Center.
- Iron and Gold Storage Containers: Same as the Copper Storage Container but crafted with iron and gold ingots and have 18 and 27 slots respectively.
